standingStones.name: Warrior
standingStones.group: The Warrior is the first Guardian Constellation.
standingStones.description: Those under the sign of the Warrior have increased strength and endurance.
standingStones.bonus: Health +50, weapons deal 10% more damage, +5 armor penetration.

standingStones.name: Mage
standingStones.group: The Mage is a Guardian Constellation whose season is Rain's Hand.
standingStones.description: Those under the sign of the Mage have increased magicka reserves and cast more potent spells.

standingStones.name: Thief
standingStones.group: The Thief is the last Guardian Constellation.
standingStones.description: Those under the sign of the Thief have increased dexterity.
standingStones.bonus: Lockpicking expertise +2, 30% harder to detect, 10% chance to avoid physical damage.
